subject: Optimization of Telegram DM Ingestion
summary: Full overhaul of the Telegram DM capture logic to ensure no data loss from personal accounts.

changes.detail: Included is_user dialogs in capture loop; added full name extraction (First + Last).
Switched from arbitrary 10-msg windows to native author/time blocks. Set domain to 'community' for private DMs.
Lowered length filter from 20 to 5 chars to capture short DMs (Hi, OK, etc.).
